query: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool repair status latest news June July 2026, algae paint peeling, is the pool fully repaired, lawsuit status
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool repair status:

**Is it fully repaired? No.** As of July 12, 2026, the pool was drained for a **second time** on Friday, July 10, 2026, for another round of repairs — it is currently drained and under active repair, having missed its July 4 (America's 250th birthday) target.

**Timeline of the troubled project:**
- The initial ~$16M+ renovation (blue polyurea coating + nanobubbler filtration, ordered by Trump) was completed in early June 2026.
- Within ~2 weeks it failed: **green algae bloomed** and the **blue coating began peeling** off the bottom.
- Trump claimed the algae was "resolved" July 6, then crews re-drained the pool July 10.

**Algae & paint peeling:** Both were the central failures of the June renovation. The administration blames the peeling on **vandalism** (claiming a "350-foot gash," ~70 fence caps thrown in), but experts and reporters (PBS, ABC, CNN) dispute this, noting no public evidence was provided.

**Vandalism/arrests:** ~5–6 arrests; former Olympic canoeist **David Hearn** was indicted on felony charges and pleaded not guilty July 10, 2026; three others face misdemeanors.

**Lawsuit status:** The Cultural Landscape Foundation lawsuit (Case 1:26-cv-01593, filed May 11, 2026) alleging NHPA Section 106 and NEPA violations remains **active/ongoing**. Judge Carl Nichols never ruled on the injunction before the work was completed, effectively mooting emergency relief, but underlying claims continue.

Note: These events are dated 2026 and reflect the current news record. Full details, sources, and data points are in the structured output.

sources.title: Reflecting Pool being drained – again – as Trump administration tries once more to fix landmark
sources.snippet: Crews began draining the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on Sunday, per Interior Secretary Doug Burgum, for the second time in three months.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool drained again as Trump administration resumes repairs
sources.snippet: Crews began draining the pool Friday July 10; David Hearn pleaded not guilty July 10; Trump declared algae resolved July 6.

sources.title: Crews draining the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool again as part of troubled revamp
sources.snippet: Effort pushes past initial July 4 deadline.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool Drained for Repairs
sources.snippet: Crews began draining the pool Friday as the Trump administration launched another round of repairs.

sources.title: 'Permanent repair' to Reflecting Pool to come around July 4, Trump says
sources.snippet: Trump said pool would be drained around July 4 for permanent repair; six arrests claimed; renovation cost over $16 million.

sources.title: Blue material peeling off bottom of Reflecting Pool, days after costly renovation
sources.snippet: CNN observed a flap of blue material partially attached to the bottom days after the pool was painted and refilled.

sources.title: Beautification Out of the (American Flag) Blue: The Lawsuit That Attempted to Halt the Reflecting Pool Makeover
sources.snippet: Lawsuit remains ongoing; court never ruled on the injunction before work completed ~June 3; project cost exceeded $16M.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool Lawsuit, Blue Paint Fight Hits Court
sources.snippet: TCLF v. Dept of Interior, Case 1:26-cv-01593, filed May 11 2026, alleging NHPA Section 106 and NEPA violations; Judge Carl Nichols.

sources.title: Lawsuit Filed to Halt Painting Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
sources.snippet: Emergency lawsuit filed May 11, 2026 on behalf of The Cultural Landscape Foundation and Charles A. Birnbaum.

sources.title: Trump ups Reflecting Pool renovation projections to 'less than $20 million' amid court fight
sources.snippet: Trump said the price will be less than $20 million; federal judge heard arguments May 21.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
sources.snippet: In 2026 the pool was resurfaced at Trump's order with a blue polyurea coating and a nanobubbler filtration system.

sources.title: Timeline: Trump's 2026 Reflecting Pool renovation project
sources.snippet: Delays, persistent green algae and added costs have hindered the project.

sources.title: DC Reflecting Pool Reopen: 2026 Visitor Guide
sources.snippet: Renovation targeted completion before July 4 2026; no confirmed full reopening.
